title: VoxCPM2 Kaggle Worker
description: Hermes-AgentMesh Core worker for Kaggle dual T4 (free 30h/week). Downloads VoxCPM2 from Hugging Face Hub at runtime, polls Upstash Redis queue, synthesizes on 2x T4 via model parallel, uploads WAV to Cloudflare R2. Requires Kaggle Secrets: REDIS_HOST, REDIS_PORT, REDIS_AUTH, R2_ENDPOINT, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, R2_BUCKET, R2_PUBLIC_URL, WORKER_ID, VOXCPM2_HF_REPO (optional).
